name: certiflow
description: CertiFlow - Digital AI Compliance Worker for Construction

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/compliance-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/ai-worker" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=api-gateway && npm run build --workspace=services/compliance-service && npm run build --workspace=services/ai-worker && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=api-gateway && npm run test --workspace=services/compliance-service && npm run test --workspace=services/ai-worker
